summary: The diff implements the three core requirements (REQ-6, REQ-7, REQ-8) with substantial coverage. REQ-6 login/logout in Navigation is fully implemented. REQ-8 inline editing for Hero, About, Portfolio, and Contact is implemented. REQ-7 backend has stable variables, public queries, and gated update functions. However, the project data model is missing 'tech tags', the owner principal initialization uses an external access-control mixin with admin token secrets rather than a simple principal-based check, and the useActor.ts file was modified despite being listed as a do-not-modify file.

missing_requirements.requirement: Stable variables store editable content including list of projects with tech tags
missing_requirements.reason: The Project type in both backend/main.mo and backend/migration.mo defines only {id, title, description, githubLink} with no tech tags field, despite the AC explicitly requiring 'title, description, tech tags, link'.

missing_requirements.requirement: Owner principal is set once during canister initialization; update functions check caller principal matches owner principal
missing_requirements.reason: The backend uses an external MixinAuthorization/AccessControl module initialized via a client-supplied admin token secret (_initializeAccessControlWithSecret) rather than a straightforward stable owner-principal variable with principal-equality checks.

hallucinated_features.description: useActor.ts was modified to call _initializeAccessControlWithSecret with a caffeineAdminToken URL/session parameter
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly lists frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts as a do-not-modify file, yet the diff shows this file was modified.

hallucinated_features.description: URL parameter persistence utility with caffeineAdminToken support including sessionStorage and hash-param clearing
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention any admin token URL parameter, caffeineAdminToken, or session-storage-based token persistence. This utility was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: User profile CRUD (getCallerUserProfile, getUserProfile, saveCallerUserProfile) and related React Query hooks
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only requires storing bio, project entries, and contact info. Separate user profile management was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: MixinAuthorization and AccessControl modules with role-based permissions (#admin, #user) integrated into the backend
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly lists multi-user or role-based access control as a non-goal, and requires all backend logic in a single Motoko actor. Separate authorization modules with multiple roles exceed the requirements.
